channel.title: Cybersecurity, Cloud and Compiler
channel.description: Insights into Cybersecurity, Cloud computing, and Compiler

item.title: The Napkin Architecture Series - Device Onboarding with SCEP and NAC
item.description: Built a Zero Trust device onboarding pipeline using MDM, a NAC proxy, and SCEP.
item.author: nerd@supasaf.com (Supa Safe)
